summary: Frontend-only regression PASSED. All 5 bugs (A-E) and every regression check verified against live preview URL. ProfileComplete wizard: city PATCH works (200 → user.city persisted → auto-advance), verification step now shows inline 4-row status list + pending/done banner, Finish button correctly gated on has_verified_identity (toast: 'Please verify at least one document (or tap Skip).'), Skip always advances/finishes, refresh-verify-status button works, go-to-verify navigates to /kyc/verify, returning from /kyc/verify + refresh flips row to ✓ Verified and unlocks Finish → /dashboard. OpenAPI ops=176.
critical_code_review_comments: ProfileComplete.jsx uses two useEffect hooks for kyc status; the second (focus listener) is fine but consider merging with the first for readability.

Verification-step progress bar shows 100% on mount (formula ((step+1)/total)*100 counts the current step as done). This is UI-only; onboarding-checklist card correctly shows 2/3 or 3/3 based on backend truth. Not a bug — behaviour is consistent — but could confuse users. Consider using step/total instead of (step+1)/total for progress-inside-wizard.
kycStatus refresh path: refreshKycStatus swallows errors silently (catch _e). If /kyc/me/status ever 5xx's, user gets no signal. Acceptable for now but log to console at minimum.
commitAndNext unwraps { user: {...} } — good fix; consistent with backend response contract. Consider centralising this unwrapping inside userApi.update() so other callers benefit.
test_credentials: Primary admin 9039791530 was rate-limited on OTP send during test window; used /api/v1/auth/dev/admin-login with token in /app/memory/test_credentials.md → logged in as admin phone 7418916209 (also admin role, has city='Custom XYZ Testville', 0 KYC docs initially — perfect for testing pending→verified transition). Verified target user 9039791530 state via direct API curl: has_verified_identity=true, all 4 docs approved, checklist 3/3 all_done=true reward_granted=true (matches problem statement claim).
seed_data_creation: Submitted 1 aadhaar KYC doc via POST /api/v1/kyc/aadhaar/verify for admin 7418916209 (auto-approved by KYC_DEV_MODE). Also set city=Bhopal via PATCH /users/me. No cleanup — harmless test data on a seeded admin.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OTP send is rate-limited (3-min window / 216s). If retesting admin 9039791530 phone flow, either wait for cooldown or fall back to /api/v1/auth/dev/admin-login (returns admin user 7418916209 — same admin permissions, different data). The dev-admin token j0XOw7fmnW8-WDX59eZP4dkIQyxmGS5g7yroYUGKRRnXt-_3qQZtiQ8AyK2otlqN is stored in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. LocalStorage keys are emergent_access_token / emergent_refresh_token / emergent_user (NOT access_token). KYC verify endpoint uses type-specific body keys: /kyc/aadhaar/verify {aadhaar_number, doc_url}; /kyc/pan/verify {pan_number, doc_url}; /kyc/gst/verify {gst_number, doc_url}; /kyc/bank/verify {account_number, doc_url}. Rate limit 5/day/type/user. All new testids in ProfileComplete: verification-step-content, verification-status-list, verify-row-{aadhaar|pan|gst|bank}, verification-done-banner, verification-pending-banner, go-to-verify, refresh-verify-status.

detailed_bug_results.BUG_A_city_save_advance: PASS — city-input renders, filling 'Bhopal' + clicking save-continue → PATCH /api/v1/users/me returns 200 with user.city='Bhopal', wizard advances to verification step, GET /users/me confirms persistence, progress-bar width=100%.
detailed_bug_results.BUG_B_verification_inline_status: PASS — verification-step-content + verification-status-list + all 4 verify-row-* testids render. For 0-doc user: verification-pending-banner shows, Finish blocked with toast 'Please verify at least one document (or tap Skip).' For verified user: verification-done-banner shows, all rows correctly reflect status ('✓ Verified' vs 'Not submitted').
detailed_bug_results.BUG_C_go_to_verify_navigation: PASS — go-to-verify click lands on /kyc/verify. After submitting aadhaar (via API sim) + returning to /profile/complete?step=verification, refreshKycStatus (on mount + focus + button) auto-refreshes → row flips to '✓ Verified', done banner appears, Finish unlocked.
detailed_bug_results.BUG_D_admin_full_flow: PASS — Finish click on verified user → toast 'Profile complete! +30 credits added' → /dashboard. For target admin 9039791530 (via direct API): checklist all_done=true, reward_granted=true, completed=3/3 (matches problem statement).
detailed_bug_results.BUG_E_fresh_user_flow: PASS (simulated via 0-doc admin) — pending-banner shown → Finish blocked → go-to-verify → doc submission → return → done-banner + Finish → /dashboard.

regression.no_console_errors: PASS (only network 401s from unauthenticated presence probes — expected)
